description: Remote shell and file transfer to fleet devices. Runs as a supervised relay the console attaches terminals to; proves the plugin seam generalizes beyond a UI client to a long-lived backend service.

listenPort.description: Port the relay listens on inside the device's network.

allowScp.description: Permit SCP/SFTP file transfer in addition to interactive shell.

idleTimeoutSeconds.description: Close an idle session after this many seconds. 0 disables the timeout.
